data.label: FMOD Studio
data.description: libfmodstudio.so 是 FMOD Studio 高级音频引擎的运行时库。它提供 API，用于播放在 FMOD Studio 工具中设计的复杂交互式声音事件、自适应音乐和 3D 空间音频。

data.label: FMOD Studio
data.description: libfmodstudio.so is the runtime library for the FMOD Studio high-level audio engine. It provides the API for playing back complex, interactive sound events, adaptive music, and 3D spatial audio designed in the FMOD Studio tool.
